content_blocks.text:
The following are the status and signal definition rules when you assign a signal definition to the status in the
[Equipment Setting] window.
Spindle axis
Status: path
Signal definition: _path
: the -th axis of the spindle axes (0 to 3)
: CNC Path (1 to 15)
Example
Given the following:
MachineName: Machine001, SignalName: SpindleLoad, m: 3, CNC Path: 1
Status: SpindleLoad3path1_Machine001
Signal definition: Machine001SpindleLoad3_path1
Servo axis
Status: path
Signal definition: _path
: the -th axis of the servo axes (0 to 23)
: CNC Path (1 to 15)
Example
Given the following:
MachineName: Machine001, SignalName: ServoSpeed, Servo axis number n: 5, CNC Path: 1
Status: ServoSpeed5path1_Machine001
Signal definition: Machine001ServoSpeed5_path1
